overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway during a heavy snowstorm. The video shows game engine footage (likely Euro Truck Simulator 2) with low visibility conditions, featuring the detailed truck dashboard, windshield wipers clearing snow, and occasional highway infrastructure like overpasses and guardrails.

overtaking a semi-truck on the right lane

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway during heavy snowfall. The truck follows another semi-truck ahead while snow accumulates on the windshield. The vehicle passes under a concrete overpass around 6 seconds and overtakes another truck on the right around 12 seconds, with metal guardrails visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with overhead sign gantries and concrete noise barriers

events.description: passing under overhead highway sign gantry structure
passing under another concrete highway overpass
right side guardrail transitions to tall concrete noise barrier wall

tall concrete noise reduction wall replacing the metal guardrail on the right side

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through the snowstorm, passing under an overhead sign gantry and another concrete overpass. Around 28 seconds, the right-side metal guardrail transitions to a tall concrete noise barrier as the highway enters a more developed section, while the truck continues following the vehicle ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with continuous concrete noise barrier on right and open fields on left

events.description: passing under concrete overpass with noise barrier walls on both sides
concrete noise barrier ends and metal guardrail returns on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving alongside the concrete noise barrier with occasional lane adjustments

entered.detail: open snow-covered field visible beyond the left guardrail

segments.scene_description: Driving along a section of highway bordered by a concrete noise barrier on the right and open snow fields visible on the left. The truck passes under another overpass around 42 seconds, and the noise barrier ends around 45 seconds, returning to metal guardrails as the highway opens up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching directional signage with open snow-covered landscape

events.description: highway sign indicating 'Dijon' becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing highway driving in heavy snow conditions, approaching road signs

entered.detail: overhead directional highway sign displaying 'Dijon' indicating the route destination
metal guardrail returning on the right side after the noise barrier section

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued driving on the snowy highway with a white car visible in the left lane. Around 54 seconds, an overhead highway sign indicating 'Dijon' becomes visible, suggesting the truck is approaching an exit or junction. The video ends with the truck continuing through the heavy snowfall with open snow fields on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a heavy snowstorm on a highway, transitioning from an open road with metal guardrails to a confined corridor and back into an open landscape. It begins inside a Mercedes truck cabin, following another semi-truck through thick snowfall and passing under a concrete overpass before overtaking a vehicle on the right. As the truck continues forward, the scene shifts as the metal guardrails are replaced by a tall concrete noise barrier and the vehicle passes under an overhead sign gantry and another overpass. The environment then opens up again as the noise barrier ends and the road returns to metal guardrails, revealing open snow fields on the left. Finally, the camera tracks past a white car in the left lane and under a highway sign for Dijon before continuing into the whiteout of the surrounding snowy plains.
